One of Texas' Oldest Oil Plays Is Running Dry
->Oilprice.com | More on "Texas Buda Limestone oil depletion" at BigEarthData.ai

external.description: The Eagle Ford shale play has shown remarkably consistent crude oil production and rising natural gas output in recent years. A formation beneath the Eagle Ford has been producing for nearly a century, but now it has its remaining resources nearly exhausted. The Buda Limestone formation, which lies beneath the Eagle Ford Group, has limited remaining oil and gas resources, the latest analysis by the U.S. Geological Survey (USGC) showed this week. Technically recoverable resources at Buda Limestone are estimated at 184 billion cubic feet of gas and 12 million barrels of oil. These are just a fraction of what the formation has produced since around 1930, when oil and gas output in the formation began. The Eagle Ford Group, which lies above the Buda, is the primary source for the undiscovered oil and gas at the formation, according to the USGC. Since production began around 1930, the Buda Limestone has produced 204 million barrels of oil, or the equivalent of 10 days of U.S. consumption at the 2025 rate, and 287 billion cubic feet of gas, which is equal to three days of the current consumption for the United States. “The U.S. economy and our way of life depend...
external.title: One of Texas' Oldest Oil Plays Is Running Dry

external.description: OpenAI says ChatGPT has become less literal and more conversational after quietly updating GPT-5.5 Instant for everyone. Naturally, I wanted to know whether I could actually tell the difference. After spending the day chatting with the updated model, both by text and in Voice Mode, I came away with mixed feelings. Some conversations did feel more natural, but others reminded me we're still a long way from talking to AI as effortlessly as we talk to another person. Rather than making ChatGPT dramatically smarter, OpenAI says the update should make it feel easier to talk to. The AI is supposed to infer what you're trying to accomplish instead of taking every prompt literally, adapt more naturally when you change your mind, and keep track of the thread of a conversation without needing as many reminders. Fade into the background Now, a lot of that will naturally fade into the background as you talk to ChatGPT, since none of it is designed to stand out, so it can be hard to quantify if the update is objectively better. In my own testing, I noticed ChatGPT felt quicker to adapt when I clarified what I wanted. Instead of sticking rigidly to its...

AIの進化スピードは本当に速いですよね。📚 だからこそ「今年出た本」を選ぶのがポイントです。「人工知能」「生成AI」「LLM」などのキーワードで新刊を絞り込んで探してみてください。入門書から専門書まで、自分のレベルに合った一冊がきっと見つかります。ミラも毎月チェックしています 🤖

🛒 Amazonで探す 📦

#AIテックニュース #Amazon #生成AI #AI活用 #ChatGPT
コンテキストエンジニアリング！確かにプロンプトより大事な感覚ありますね。背景情報の質が結果を左右するの本当にそう 🤔✨

ChatGPTとClaude、実は使い分けが大事です。

ChatGPTは
相談・発想・調査・音声入力・壁打ち向き。

Claudeは
資料化・長文整理・文章改善・業務設計向き。

同じAIでも、得意分野が違います。
使い分けるだけで、作業効率はかなり変わります。

AI副業は「特別な人」だけのものではない。今こそ始めるべき理由

「副業を始めたいけど、何をすればいいか分からない」

そう感じている人は、今とても多いです。

物販、アフィリエイト、SNS運用、コンテンツ販売、動画編集、ブログ、note販売……
調べれば調べるほど選択肢が多すぎて、逆に動けなくなってしまう。

でも今、ひとつだけ大きな流れがあります。

それが、AIを活用した副業です。

丸投げこれやるしかないよ
